# Sovereign AI Skills Marketplace

## What
The first open skill marketplace for Claude Code. 144 production-grade slash commands
covering system ops, security, DevOps, content creation, video production, distribution,
analytics, knowledge management, governance, and AI kernel operations.

## Install
curl -fsSL https://skills.activemirror.ai/install.sh | bash

## Skills
Each skill is a markdown file that becomes a /slash-command in Claude Code.
Drop any .md file into ~/.claude/commands/ and it's instantly available.

## Categories
- System Operations (24 skills): forensic, benchmark, regression, health, pulse, smoke
- Security (2 skills): adversarial, guardian
- DevOps (9 skills): deploy, release, commit, pr, ship, test, review
- Research (8 skills): paper, experiment, prove, breakthrough, capability, evolve
- Content Creation (18 skills): draft, storytell, thread, hook, headline, newsletter
- Video Production (11 skills): daily-video, shorts, clip, thumbnail, timelapse
- Distribution & SEO (17 skills): viral, glyph, seo-aeo-aio, auto-publish, beacon
- Analytics & Growth (14 skills): analytics, growth, funnel, engagement, trending
- Vault & Knowledge (11 skills): audit, triage, find, link, compress, backup
- AI Kernel (4 skills): dream, cognitive, reflect, council
- Governance (20+ skills): incident, contract, onboard, handoff, sync, bus
